title: hieracium bifidum subsp. dimorphophyllum
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. dimorphophyllum, also known as Devil's-bit scabious, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hieracium bifidum subsp. dimorphophyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it has been traditionally used in the form of a poultice or salve to treat wounds and skin irritations.
